sections.title: Job Application
sections.subtitle: A conversation about a job application at a recruitment agency

questions.question: Applicant name: _______
questions.explanation: The applicant introduces himself as James Wilson.|申请者自我介绍叫James Wilson。

questions.question: Position applied for: _______
questions.explanation: He is applying for the sales assistant position.|他应聘的是销售助理职位。

questions.question: Previous experience: _______ years
questions.explanation: He has two years of retail experience.|他有两年零售经验。

questions.question: Available start date: _______
questions.explanation: He can start on 1 June.|他可以在6月1日开始。

questions.question: What qualification does he have?
questions.explanation: He completed a business diploma last year.|他去年完成了商业文凭。

questions.question: Reference name: _______
questions.explanation: His reference is Dr. Brown from college.|他的推荐人是学院的Brown博士。

questions.question: Reference phone: _______
questions.explanation: Dr. Brown's phone number is 020 7946 0123.|Brown博士的电话是020 7946 0123。

questions.question: How did he hear about the job?
questions.explanation: He saw the advertisement online.|他在网上看到招聘广告。

questions.question: Interview time: _______ AM
questions.explanation: The interview is scheduled for 10:30 AM.|面试安排在上午10:30。

questions.question: What should he bring to the interview?
questions.explanation: He needs to bring photo identification.|他需要携带带照片的身份证明。
